known_caveats: All 8 guides: page_count=0 (cosmetic — endorsement guides use header-line metadata; page count not available from this format; content intact)
ENDELL: version=201112 (oldest guide in family); pages=0 same cause
ENDMEMG and ENDSEMG: smallest guides in corpus (295 lines, 2 SP rows each) — valid by design
SP format split: 7 of 8 guides use 2-column (no Term); ENDELL uses 3-column — both handled correctly
Phase A manifest high-uncertainty flag was unfounded — parser handles all 8 correctly without changes
safe_fields: page_count — cosmetic 0 for all 8; do not use as content quality signal

partial_families: accounting_ma (MACC+MACCM only; MACCA, MACCF, MACCT deferred)
